PathOfBuilding.Notes:
Level with ^xE05030Sunder^7 until you have enough gold (+ Regrets) to respec to ^x70FF70Cyclone^7 should be around ^xD02090level 75^7 or so
be sure to grab ^xD02090Resolute Technique^7 by late Act 3 / early Act 4 (Taunt node DOES give perma-acc but doesn't feel good with slams hitting hard n once)
// ASCENDANCIES // ^xD02090normal^7 Lab = ^xD02090Worthy Foe^7 ^xD02090cruel^7 Lab = ^xD02090Fortitude^7 ^xD02090merc^7 Lab = ^xD02090Unstoppable Hero^7 ^xD02090uber^7 Lab = ^xD02090Master of Metal^7 (only necessary when you swap to ^x70FF70Cyclone^7! > if you swap early, take this node before ^xD02090Unstoppable Hero^7)
if you ^xD02090need more tips^7 for leveling with Sunder, I have an ENTIRELY detailed leveling guide ^xD02090written for Marauder^7 - you can use it for its "Notes" section but ^xD02090FOLLOW THIS GUIDE'S PASSIVE TREE^7! << https://pobb.in/eFWqRhN1OiSJ >> ^xD02090** WRITTEN FOR MARAUDER**^7 ** DO ^xD02090NOT^7 SWAP TO ^xE05030Earthshatter^7 IF YOU FOLLOW THE ABOVE BUILD FOR LEVELING! YOU ARE SWAPPING TO ^x70FF70Cyclone^7!
---------------------------------------CYCLONE DETAILS--------------------------------------------------- use ^xD02090NORMAL Cyclone^7 for general mapping
use ^xD02090Cyclone OF TUMULT ^7for pinnacle bossing (and prob t17s too) > you can also grab ^xAF6025The Stampede^7 boots and use ^xD02090Tumult^7 for everything
^xD02090clearing^7 (mapping) = ^xB97123SAND STANCE^7 ^xD02090bossing^7 / tanky enemies = ^xE05030BLOOD STANCE^7
getting one or two "^xD02090-x mana cost of channelling skills^7" (Elreon's Veiled mod on jewelry) will help significantly if you run into mana issues

Items.Item: Rarity: UNIQUE The Celestial Brace Goliath Gauntlets Armour: 480 ArmourBasePercentile: 1 Quality: 20 Sockets: R-R-R-R LevelReq: 53 Implicits: 0 {range:0.5}(80-120)% Increased Armour 1% Increased Attack Speed per Fortification {range:1}+(1-10) to Maximum Fortification Melee Hits from Strike Skills Fortify

Input.name: customMods
customMods
Input.string: // champ changes 18% more armour and evasion 18% increased attack speed enemies taunted by you take 20% increased damage enemies taunted by you cannot evade attacks // cyclone changes (Tumult) 11% more damage 11% more attack speed 16% less mana cost 4% more attack speed // reg Cyclone changes (use for Clearing) +1.9 metres to melee strike range 20% less movement speed

Input.name: customMods
Input.string: // champ changes 66% more armour and evasion 66% increased attack speed enemies taunted by you take 20% increased damage enemies taunted by you cannot evade attacks // cyclone changes (Tumult) 11% more damage 11% more attack speed 16% less mana cost 4% more attack speed // reg Cyclone changes (use for Clearing) +1.9 metres to melee strike range 20% less movement speed
